nl_query: Show all approved revaluation requests where the resulting evaluation attempt was created but the evaluator has not started marking within 3 working days of the attempt assignment.
failed_sql:
SELECT rr.id AS request_id, rr.script_id, rr.approved_at, ea.id AS attempt_id, ea.status, ea.evaluator_user_id, au.display_name AS evaluator, sa.start_date, acad.cal_date, acad.is_holiday, acad.is_weekend, acad.holiday_name, acad.academic_year
FROM revaluation_request rr
JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.id = rr.resulting_attempt_id
JOIN script_assignment sa ON sa.id = ea.assignment_id
JOIN academic_calendar acad ON acad.cal_date = sa.start_date
JOIN app_user au ON au.id = ea.evaluator_user_id
WHERE rr.approval_status = 'APPROVED'
  AND ea.status = 'ASSIGNED'
  AND ea.is_active = TRUE
  AND sa.start_date < working_day_offset(acad.cal_date, 3, acad.academic_year)
ORDER BY rr.approved_at ASC
LIMIT 200;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): script_assignment.cal_date, script_assignment.cal_date, script_assignment.cal_date. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
